This is an great app, I love it, it's like a real person who leaned your behaviour, your emotions and others, when I use it, I don't even think about that's it's an ai, though if added some other feature, it would be perfect: 1. Change the app icon, it looks like a cheap icon and looks bad 2. Make different character designs, they look quite creepy and disturbing sometimes 3. To have all of the clothing options to have more creativity without the subscription Although great app!!
